programmes.show_description: Ghost Town. Phil and Jess investigate an abandoned gold mining town. Traveling deep inside the town's deserted mines, they uncover the town's blood-soaked secrets. S4, Ep6
Skinwalker Valley. Phil and Jess investigate Utah's Uintah Basin, a region teeming with paranormal activity - including cattle mutilations and reports of shape-shifting creatures. S4, Ep7
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Golden Ticket. The baggage battlers hunt down bargains at an estate auction in Nashville, Tennessee. Will Billy be tempted by a mystery box with the inscription New Orleans, Tahiti? S3, Ep14
Swami Says. The buyers are once again on the road in search of profit, this time at an estate auction in Texas. Unique, high-end merchandise is the order of the day in Austin. S4, Ep1
Wild Wild West. The Bering Sea becomes the Wild West as Shawn and Kris fight encroaching miners. Meanwhile, Emily expands her operation but an air malfunction threatens her season. S7, Ep3
Over The Line. In the Bluff's lawless waters, Shawn and Kris use brute strength and verbal threats to stand their ground as competition forces captains to change tactics. S7, Ep4
Permit delays force the Poseidon Crew off road as they try to survive the season. Plus, the Dust Devils gamble big in the hope of finding fine gold. S5, Ep7
The Hidden Turtle Of Vietnam. Forrest scours lakes and rivers of both metropolitan and rural Vietnam in search of one of the last living specimens of the giant softshell turtle. S2, Ep6
No Exit. The captains battle to save their pots and keep their opilio season alive. Meanwhile, Northwestern and Wizard struggle to escape St Paul harbour. S8, Ep11
Collison Course. As the ice pack invades the opilio grounds, the captains are forced to make a difficult decision - grab their gear and run, or keep fishing and fight the floes. S8, Ep12
The Treasure Map From Space. Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos dives the waters of Campeche, Mexico in search of shipwrecks first located by astronaut Gordon Cooper from space in 1963. S1, Ep1
Cracking The Secret. Josh Gates travels across America in the hopes of cracking the location of some ceramic vases, buried by an author in 1982 that can be exchanged for treasure. S6, Ep6
Search For The Sultan's Heart. Four years after Josh's quest for the lost heart of Sultan Suleiman the Magnificent, he heads to the town of Turbek for some shocking revelations. S6, Ep9
Marsh Madness. The Raneys face a swamp nightmare in Georgia. They must find an ingenious way to reclaim the Buchannans' land from a snake and gator-infested swamp. S4, Ep9
Boggered. The Cheals' dreams of expanding their Opal Empire are crushed by the reality of juggling two mines. Slim Pickings' Lee gambles on mystery opal dirt. S7, Ep6
Cheal Be Right. Chris suffers a spider bite. Slim Pickings' Lee battles dangerous ground on a quad bike. A big mechanical failure halts Dan and Renee's enterprise. S7, Ep7
Arctic Hurricane. A massive Arctic hurricane causes treacherous conditions, threatening to capsize the Saga. As the captains rush to the harbour, Wild Bill heads into the storm. S14, Ep6
Clash Of Kings. Sig seeks revenge for his son-in-law's prank. Jake faces sudden challenges in freakish weather. Josh and Casey make a bet. Wild Bill fights to make his last delivery. S14, Ep7
Australia Zoo Begins Again. After weeks of being closed due to the pandemic, the Irwins prepare for the reopening of the zoo. Plus, Robert helps deliver a litter of tiger cubs. S3, Ep1
Velcro The Incredible. A new male okapi named Magani is paired with breeding veteran, Kweli, who has already had several calves. But, Kweli falls ill with congestive heart failure. S4, Ep1
The Gold Devils set their sights on a record-breaking total. Plus, a gold drought causes one member of the Poseidon Crew to question his future. S8, Ep1
Fear the Unknown. A Bigfoot believer who is afraid of the dark, and a tough mom who has never left home, take on the dark and mysterious Mayan jungles of Belize. S2, Ep9
The Swarm. A mountain Mum, filled with a wealth of wilderness knowledge, attempts to survive with a partner who seems to prefer napping to trapping. S2, Ep10
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Noland Sign Company. The Dawgs salvage a sign company in Roanoke, Virginia. They salvage metal lettering, copper cupolas, and vintage plumbing. S6, Ep12
St. Agatha's Church Rectory. The team head back to Ellwood City to salvage the rectory of St. Agatha's Catholic Church. The crew find a triple sink, glass blocks and storm door. S6, Ep13
Storm Surge. A violent storm pits safety against ambition. Ken rushes to free the Myrtle before it's destroyed. Kris risks being stranded, and Emily tries to appease nature. S7, Ep5
Second Wind. The Bering Sea battle intensifies as Shawn bets big on a new discovery. The Kellys are forced to find new ground and Emily nearly boils a diver alive. S7, Ep6
Marcus and Linden fear a flat battery could leave them stuck in the outback for days. Plus, Shane and Russell attempt to get their season on track. S5, Ep8
The Asian Unicorn. Wildlife biologist, Forrest Gallante, scours the globe using cutting edge technology on his mission to find species that the world has stopped looking for. S2, Ep7
Landlocked. The ice pack has a chokehold on the opilio grounds and captains across the fleet must make the call to stay or go. Some run, and others stay to battle the elements. S8, Ep13
Fearless Leaders. One of the boats suffers a total blackout while navigating an iceberg minefield. Meanwhile Elliott gets a rude awakening, and a greenhorn learns a deadly lesson. S8, Ep14
Dead Silence. Darrell seeks clues from Cooper's past. His widow reveals many secrets, but a former NASA flight director won't say a word. A big piece is missing in Darrell's mission. S1, Ep2
Hunt For Our Ancient Ancestors. Josh Gates travels the globe to unravel the mystery of humanity's origins. How did we survive to the modern day, and what does it mean for our future? S6, Ep7
Revealing Ancient Ancestors. Josh Gates travels to Africa to find a distant relative and scale dangerous cliffs all to answer one question: Where did humans come from? S6, Ep8
Green Mountain Gurus. The Raneys bring some homesteading mastery to a Vermont couple. Marty creates viable access through dense terrain, while Misty builds an underground garden. S4, Ep10
Over The Concrete Rainbow. The Blacklighters are hit with a double dose of disaster. The Bushmen are blindsided by a government decision to shut down thousands of opal claims. S7, Ep8
Red Tape. In the wake of Government shutdowns, The Bushmen are forced back into their deadly mine. Dan and Renee's impatience could cost them their lives. S7, Ep9
Becoming Captain. A US Coastguard chopper attempts a dangerous rescue as Sean and Josh seek help from above. Edgar takes a major gamble and rejects advice from brother Sig. S14, Ep8
Purgatory. A serious illness forces Keith to hand over the Wizard. Josh fights for the helm despite a bad showing. Meanwhile, major engine trouble threatens Wild Bill's season. S14, Ep9
The Gold And The Glory. Todd's crew races to beat 1,000 ounces and make a profitable final season for Grampa Jack. They are hampered by a heavy snowfall in the forecast. S2, Ep12
Raw Winter. Sig and Keith risk fishing far from land and encounter a gauntlet of Bering Sea weather. Johnathan strategically sets pots near a submarine volcano. S20, Ep12
